unit.name: hooks/plugin-api runtime boundary
unit.public_contract: plugin.php and class-wp-hook.php public hook API shell with Haxe-owned runtime decisions and PHP-native callback/reference/global boundary

bridge.reason: PHP callables, by-reference arrays, globals, reflection-visible declarations, and include timing remain PHP-native at the public shell. The Haxe boundary owns scalar/string hook decisions while WPHX-305 moves remaining shell emission into Haxe/compiler-owned output.

removal_gate.condition: Promote the hook/plugin API workset to verified_haxe_owned after distribution provenance, source maps, and any remaining public ABI bridges are reviewed and approved as stable rather than temporary.

notes: WPHX-304 replaces bounded hook shell decisions with typed Haxe runtime calls without using broad php.Syntax.code. The public shell remains PHP-native where WordPress plugin compatibility depends on callables, references, globals, and reflection.
